demo.name: Homeward Journey
description: A light drink with a slightly sweet taste.
Too bad it isn't easy to make -- rare ingredients are required.
comment: To leave a midnight tavern and wake up in a sweat-soaked bed with no idea how you got there - that's magic practiced only by Tortuga's most seasoned 'wizards.'

demo.name: Undead Essence
description: Rumored to be used not only in alchemy, but also in the creation of enhanced weapons.
A strange substance, slightly cold to the touch.

demo.name: Elixir of Firm Hand
description: An orange elixir with heavy sediment at the bottom, with almost no taste or smell.
Drink it and your body swells with strength, your jaw clenches, and speech comes hard, but your sabre arm will thank you.
comment: In close combat, the victor is not the swiftest, but the one who does not falter.

demo.name: Elixir of Precision
description: A murky green draught steeped in wolf fangs.
They say that if, after a hard night, you place a dog's fang under your tongue before sleep, your hands won't shake come morning.
The buccaneers of the archipelago took the idea further and brewed this elixir, hoping to save on bullets.
comment: If you missed, it wasn't the target - it was bait!
